text.title: Backend Testing Across Languages Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the testing-backend-languages methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-language-and-runner
step.action: Set language + runner pair. Reject unsupported.

step.name: scope-decision
step.action: For Spring: pick slice annotation. For .NET: decide WebApplicationFactory yes/no. For Rust async: pick tokio::test.

step.name: scaffold-test-file
step.action: Emit test file with idiomatic conventions: factory_bot/let in RSpec, RefreshDatabase + postJson in Pest, MockitoExtension + @Mock in JUnit, Moq + FluentAssertions in xUnit, #[tokio::test] in Rust.

step.name: shallow-mocks
step.action: Mock only direct collaborators. Refactor any deeper mock into an integration test.

step.name: ci-time-budget
step.action: Measure suite wall time. If >10 min, split slow tier behind a tag (e.g., :integration / @Tag('integration') / [Trait('slow', '')]) and run on nightly.
